frame_analyses.technique_notes: Professional FLS training environment with organized instrument display

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Clear demonstration of laparoscopic cable management

frame_analyses.description: Close-up view of laparoscopic grasper in use, demonstrating handle mechanics and tip control
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates proper instrument control and handling technique

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Side-by-side comparison of cutting instruments used in FLS tasks

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates standard FLS needle holding instrument

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates precision grasping instrument for delicate tissue work

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Essential tool for knot management in tasks 4 and 5

frame_analyses.technique_notes: Demonstrates proper suction instrument for hemostasis and visualization

confidence_rationale: Video classification is definitive. This is an instructional/educational video with an expert instructor demonstrating FLS equipment in a training facility. No performance task is being executed, therefore no FLS score should be calculated.
cannot_determine: Specific task performance metrics - this is not a performance video
technique_summary: This video is an educational overview of FLS instrumentation and equipment, not a scored task performance. The instructor systematically demonstrates the key instruments used across all five FLS tasks in a controlled training environment.
strengths: Clear demonstration of instrument handling and mechanics
Organized presentation of equipment with proper labeling

demonstrated_techniques: Proper laparoscopic grasper handling and tip control
Needle holder grip and needle control (Crile-Wood)
Knot pusher use for extracorporeal suture management
Fine forceps control for precision tasks
verbal_cues: Equipment overview in professional training context
Explanation of instrument purposes across FLS tasks
common_errors_addressed: Improper instrument grip - demonstrates correct positioning
Poor instrument control - shows how to maintain precision
Instrument confusion - clearly identifies each tool by name and function

improvement_suggestions: This is instructional content - no performance scoring applicable
